# CycleShiftAllInput

Input for shifting all cycles from a certain cycle onwards by a certain number of days

## Summary

- Kind: `input_object`


## Input Fields

| Name | Type | Default | Deprecated | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `daysToShift` | [`Float`](../scalars/float-scalar.md)! | `n/a` | No | The number of days to shift the cycles by. |
| `id` | [`String`](../scalars/string-scalar.md)! | `n/a` | No | The cycle ID at which to start the shift. |
